values.fullName: AAAHC %28Accreditation Association for Ambulatory Health Care%29
CARF %E2%80%93 Commission on Accreditation of Rehab Facilities
CIHQ %28Center for Improvement in Healthcare Quality%29
Affiliated Client site%2C system medical staff app and one approving body
Affiliated Client site%2E system medical staff app and separate approving bodies
Independent Client site%2C unique medical staff app and one approving body
